data.text/markdown:
Account authenticity triage

7,417 accounts scored. No ground-truth labels: this ranks how bot-like an account looks, it does not prove inauthenticity. Heuristic weights: ratio 0.3 · age 0.25 · rate 0.15 · dup 0.15 · bio 0.05 · img 0.05 · handle 0.05. suspicion is in [0,1], age + follower/following ratio dominant. anomaly_rank is an unsupervised isolation-forest second lens. It flags statistical outliers - which includes genuine mega-influencers - so read it alongside suspicion, never alone.
